title: Fix UVM function non-constant default arguments
body:
Fix UVM function argument type mismatch handling.  This is one of a few remaining blockers to UVM #1538.

This can be seen by editing test_regress/t/t_uvm_all.pl to remove --debug-exit-uvm, and commenting out the line to workaround #4466.

```
%Error: t/t_uvm_pkg_all.vh:7662:17: Function Argument expects a CLASSREFDTYPE 'uvm_object', got BASICDTYPE 'logic'
%Error: t/t_uvm_pkg_all.vh:7688:13: Function Argument expects a CLASSREFDTYPE 'uvm_object', got BASICDTYPE 'logic'
%Error: t/t_uvm_pkg_all.vh:10304:17: Function Argument expects a CLASSREFDTYPE 'uvm_object', got BASICDTYPE 'logic'
%Error: t/t_uvm_pkg_all.vh:10286:19: Function Argument expects a CLASSREFDTYPE 'uvm_object', got BASICDTYPE 'logic'
%Error: t/t_uvm_pkg_all.vh:10239:7: Function Argument expects a CLASSREFDTYPE 'uvm_object', got BASICDTYPE 'logic'
%Error: t/t_uvm_pkg_all.vh:13965:8: Function Argument expects a CLASSREFDTYPE 'uvm_object', got BASICDTYPE 'logic'
%Error: t/t_uvm_pkg_all.vh:13829:7: Function Argument expects a CLASSREFDTYPE 'uvm_object', got BASICDTYPE 'logic'
13829 |     e.trigger();
      |       ^~~~~~~
```
